payload.description: After Prescriber contradiction review and any explicitly approved invalidations are complete, build a deterministic associated dataset for Medication Review: Prescriber from the cleaned 90-day feedback window, then relaunch the optimizer from version 63892e5d-bacc-483c-89ff-429ff2131100 with a hint preferring GPT 5.4 mini. Constraints: keep RelevantWindowsTranscriptFilter, do not retry full-context removal, do not retry GPT 5.4 nano, do not retry extractor-ledger, and only test narrow SRX doctor-link confirmation rules after contradiction cleanup. Use direct CLI logs as the source of truth for the optimizer run. Do not start until exact invalidation approvals are recorded.
payload.title: Build Prescriber vetted regression slice and restart optimizer from GPT-5.4-mini baseline
